texts.name: Beren
texts.biography: While others of his people think of bow and branch, Beren long ago mastered the quiet power of gold. Careful trade, hidden agreements and a web of allies far beyond the forest keep coin flowing into the Sylvan Alliance's coffers. Some question his methods, but none can argue with the result: where Beren appears, prosperity soon follows.

specialty.description: Provides your kingdom with an additional 350 gold per day.
specialty.tooltip:
{Gold}

Increases kingdom income by 350 gold per day.
specialty.name: +350 Gold
